overall.description: A first-person walk along an elevated bridge walkway in a futuristic cyberpunk city (Cyberpunk 2077). The camera moves steadily past towering skyscrapers with neon advertisements and heavy traffic, briefly pans down to reveal the waterway beneath the bridge, then continues forward before turning to observe flying vehicle traffic against an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated bridge walkway between futuristic skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the bridge walkway, observing the futuristic architecture and passing vehicles on the right

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving past on the multi-lane road

entered.detail: tall futuristic skyscraper with ARASAKA signage and distinctive architecture
building with prominent JINGUJI signage and gold trim details
large vertical billboard displaying AVANT advertisement
metal safety railing along the pedestrian walkway
elevated highway with multiple lanes of futuristic traffic
tall dark glass building facade with neon accents

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a steady forward walk along an elevated bridge walkway in a dense cyberpunk city. To the left, the massive Arasaka tower and Jinguji building rise with neon signage, while to the right, a multi-lane road carries futuristic traffic. The scene is enclosed by towering structures on both sides with limited sky visibility.

events.description: camera pans down from forward view to look at the water below the bridge deck
camera pans back up to resume forward-facing position

agents.ego_description: pausing forward progression to look down at the canal water and bridge supports beneath

entered.detail: murky green water flowing beneath the bridge with visible reflections
massive concrete pillars supporting the bridge deck above
buildings and infrastructure visible at the water level in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts down to reveal the waterway flowing beneath the bridge, showing concrete support pillars and the lower levels of the city. The view is sheltered under the bridge deck with no sky visible, focusing on the murky water and industrial structures below before tilting back up.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated bridge with open sky view and air traffic

events.description: camera turns right to face the road and tilts upward toward the sky

agents.ego_description: continuing along the bridge before turning to observe the flying vehicle traffic overhead

notable_agents.action: flying vehicle hovering in the sky above the road

entered.detail: futuristic hovering car with glowing lights visible against the clouds
tall ornate street lamp along the bridge railing
overcast sky with grey clouds visible as camera tilts up

segments.scene_description: The camera resumes its forward path along the bridge, with the Jinguji building visible again on the left. As the camera turns right, the scene opens to a wide view of the multi-lane road, street lamps, and the overcast sky. A futuristic flying vehicle hovers in the distance, revealing the three-dimensional nature of the city's traffic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a steady forward progression along an elevated bridge that transitions from a claustrophobic urban canyon into an expansive view of a multi-layered cityscape. It begins with a walk between the towering Arasaka and Jinguji buildings, where neon signage and dense skyscrapers enclose the view on both sides. As the camera tilts downward, the perspective shifts from the skyline to the murky waterway and concrete support pillars flowing beneath the bridge deck. The scene then resumes its forward momentum past the Jinguji building before turning right to open the vista toward a wide multi-lane road and a heavy overcast sky. Finally, the view expands to reveal a futuristic flying vehicle hovering in the distance, highlighting the three-dimensional scale of the city's traffic.
